text:
#FBF - Filming @honest_renovations with my girl @lizzymathis 👷🏽‍♀️🤍 Never a dull moment - between demo day chaos, near-death spider encounters, and somehow still getting it all done… it’s always an adventure 😂

But honestly, getting to transform these spaces and lives never gets old. What we get to do is pretty special - beyond grateful🙏🏽

Shoutout to @revoluxusa for bringing these before-and-afters to life. The surfaces don’t lie 🤌🏽 Made with 90% recycled materials, they’re beautiful, intentional, and actually built for real life. 

Season 4 is coming soon… just wait 👀✨ #HonestRenovations #FlashbackFriday #BeforeAndAfter #RevoluxPartner
Something out of my wildest dreams… @honest in space. What?!🤯🥹 @astro_christina sending you all the Honest lotion when you’re back on Earth - and I hope you found it up there! 👩🏼‍🚀🧴🚀
Q1, wrapped 🫰🏽 The people, places & things that made it sweet 🤍
Spring break. Favorite humans. Favorite place. Pure joy 🤍

My dear friend Jill’s new book is now out in the world, and I couldn’t be more proud to witness this moment 🤍💫

What Jill has created is a deeply introspective and honest account of resilience - one that traces her path through profound adversity toward a hard-won sense of inner clarity. At its core, this is a story about the discipline of trusting one’s own voice and the quiet, radical act of choosing truth and light, even in the midst of chaos.

Though Jill and I have lived vastly different lives, her work resonated with me in a meaningful and unexpected way. It is not only inspiring, but also offers a thoughtful framework for navigating one’s inner landscape - how to listen more closely, forgive more honestly, and continue moving forward with intention, even when circumstances feel insurmountable.

For those drawn to nuanced, deeply human narratives - stories that balance spiritual inquiry with grounded, practical insight - Spirit Daughter: Own Your Power, Change Your Life is a remarkable contribution. Link in bio to check it out 💭 

I love you, Jill. I’m so proud of you, @spiritdaughter and the work you’ve brought into the world 🫶🏽

Baby Jess in the #90s… she really had no idea what was coming 🥹💭

📸: images courtesy of respective photographers
